# Predaja zadataka {.unnumbered}

Na ovoj stranici predajete zadatke.

<div class="upload-form">
  <h3>Predaja zadataka</h3>

  <input type="text" id="ime" placeholder="Ime">
  <input type="text" id="prezime" placeholder="Prezime">

  <select id="setZadataka">
    <option value="">Odaberi set zadataka</option>
    <option value="Limesi">Limesi</option>
    <option value="Derivacije1">Derivacije 1. dio</option>
    <!-- <option value="Derivacije2">Derivacije 2. dio</option>
    <option value="Derivacije3">Derivacije 3. dio</option> -->
  </select>

  <input type="file" id="file" multiple>

  <button id="uploadBtn" onclick="upload()">Pošalji rješenje</button>

  <p id="status"></p>
</div>

<script type="module">
import { createClient } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js/+esm";

const supabaseUrl = "https://jwsvnvvexmwnvjovdbyg.supabase.co";
const supabaseKey = "sb_publishable_OJODRwGSdsFkc78-XMO_LQ__B_a2EJ3";

const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseKey);

function sanitize(str) {
  return str
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
    .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_");
}

window.upload = async function () {

  const btn = document.getElementById("uploadBtn");

  const ime = document.getElementById("ime").value.trim();
  const prezime = document.getElementById("prezime").value.trim();
  const setZadataka = document.getElementById("setZadataka").value;
  const files = document.getElementById("file").files;

  if (!ime || !prezime || !setZadataka || files.length === 0) {
    alert("Popuni sve podatke i odaberi set + datoteke.");
    return;
  }

  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.classList.add("loading");
  btn.innerText = "Šaljem...";

  const imeSafe = sanitize(ime);
  const prezimeSafe = sanitize(prezime);

  const uploadedFiles = [];

  for (let file of files) {

    const filePath = `${setZadataka}/${imeSafe}_${prezimeSafe}/${Date.now()}-${file.name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9.\-_]/g, "_")}`;

    const { error } = await supabase.storage
      .from("submissions")
      .upload(filePath, file);

    if (error) {
      console.error(error);
      alert("Greška pri uploadu: " + file.name);

      // reset button on error
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.classList.remove("loading");
      btn.innerText = "Pošalji rješenje";

      return;
    }

    uploadedFiles.push({
      ime,
      prezime,
      set_zadataka: setZadataka,
      datoteka: file.name,
      putanja: filePath
    });
  }

  const { error: dbError } = await supabase
    .from("predaje")
    .insert(uploadedFiles);

  if (dbError) {
    console.error(dbError);
    alert("DB ERROR: " + JSON.stringify(dbError));

    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.classList.remove("loading");
    btn.innerText = "Pošalji rješenje";

    return;
  }

  // success state
  btn.classList.remove("loading");
  btn.classList.add("success");
  btn.innerText = "Uspješno ✔";

  document.getElementById("status").innerText =
    "Upload uspješan! Sve datoteke su spremljene.";

  // reset after 3 seconds
  setTimeout(() => {
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.classList.remove("success");
    btn.innerText = "Pošalji rješenje";
  }, 3000);

  console.log("Upload OK");
};
</script>
